features.name: Phase One evidence validation
features.behavior: Prove fresh runtime fingerprinted vLLM and SGLang measurements, exact reuse on identical repeats, runtime drift rejection, and managed lifecycle failure cleanup.
verification: fresh and repeat vLLM managed runs
fresh and repeat SGLang managed runs
done_when: Each backend has fresh measured evidence.
Each identical repeat uses exact fresh evidence with zero launches and zero workload measurements.
Runtime and command drift block exact reuse.
Failure and interruption artifacts remain inspectable.

features.name: Phase Two product truth repair
features.behavior: Reconcile user, architecture, compatibility, state, verification, feature, progress, and handoff documentation with the verified product surface.
done_when: Managed Mode is no longer described as future work.
SGLang is no longer described as only an experimental MVP.
One compatibility document defines support and exclusions.
README distinguishes implemented behavior from planned research.
Current state and next phase are consistent.

features.name: Attach Mode
features.behavior: Benchmark an already running OpenAI compatible endpoint, collect optional telemetry, and recommend the best among evaluated operating points.
done_when: Measured and predicted values remain distinct.
Attach Mode does not claim the endpoint launch command.
Artifacts remain inspectable.

features.name: vLLM Managed Mode
features.behavior: Detect capabilities, validate candidates, render canonical commands, launch and stop vLLM, benchmark the endpoint, manage evidence, and write recommendations.
verification: Phase One vLLM fresh and repeat artifacts
done_when: Lifecycle and evidence reuse are verified.
Capability and command drift block exact reuse.
Recommendations remain evaluated set scoped.

features.name: SGLang Managed Mode
features.behavior: Provide first class lifecycle and evidence parity for the capability detected SGLang surface while rejecting ambiguous vLLM only fields.
verification: Phase One SGLang fresh and repeat artifacts
done_when: SGLang capabilities, rendering, lifecycle, evidence, and recommendations are verified.
--disable-piecewise-cuda-graph remains rendered and fingerprinted.
Unsupported fields are rejected or marked unavailable.

features.name: Phase Three reproducible installation
features.behavior: Align package profiles with validated backend environments and prove clean installation paths.
done_when: Package extras match documented profiles.
Validated pins and environment files exist.
Compiler and CUDA diagnostics are actionable.
No SSL verification bypass is used.

features.name: Phase Four unified user experience
features.behavior: Provide one coherent workflow across Attach and Managed modes with actionable preflight, evidence, budget, failure, repeat, and resume behavior.
done_when: Users can identify the primary workflow without reading implementation details.
Preflight explains backend, workload, budget, evidence, and output behavior before launch.
Failures state the failed stage and retained artifacts.
Repeat and resume semantics are explicit and safe.

features.name: Phase Five realistic workloads and SLOs
features.behavior: Add explicit workload manifests, token distribution identity, and SLO constraints for recommendation eligibility.
done_when: Short, medium, long, decode heavy, repeated prefix, and mixed workload profiles are representable.
Workload identity participates in evidence compatibility.
TTFT, TPOT, latency, throughput, and failure constraints can mark candidates ineligible.
Recommendation artifacts explain workload and SLO constraints.

features.name: Phase Six measurement quality
features.behavior: Add defensible measurement quality controls and aggregate statistics for endpoint and managed benchmarks.
done_when: Benchmarks can exclude warmup requests.
Benchmarks can report steady state windows.
Idle baseline power can produce idle subtracted active energy.
Managed multi trial runs aggregate before recommendation and evidence writes.
Aggregate summaries include confidence intervals and stability classification.

features.name: Phase Seven optimizer quality
features.behavior: Add bounded evaluated candidate baselines, search regret, candidate policy coverage, and artifact backed failure cache records.
done_when: Recommendations expose optimizer quality metadata.
Managed runs write optimizer quality artifacts.
Managed runs write failure cache artifacts.
Regret remains scoped to evaluated candidates.
Recommendation wording remains best among evaluated candidates.

features.name: Phase Eight release engineering
features.behavior: Add local release readiness checks, CI workflow, release gates, release documentation, and support matrix.
done_when: Release readiness can be checked by CLI.
Fast and full verification scripts are present.
CI workflow runs the fast gate.
Release documentation is present.
Support matrix is present.

features.name: Phase Nine evaluation and research package
features.behavior: Package existing managed run artifacts into reproducible research manifests, methodology, run tables, and coverage tables.
done_when: Research packages use existing managed run artifacts only.
Research packages write manifest, methodology, run table, and coverage table artifacts.
Coverage is reported for backends, goals, workloads, models, dtypes, quantization, and telemetry quality.
Methodology keeps claims scoped to supplied evidence.
